title: Iced Intense Mediterranean Bellflower-root-doraji Bowl
description: A refreshing post-workout dish featuring tender bellflower-root-doraji, perfect for hot summer days. This mustardy, dairy-free-friendly bowl is a twist on traditional Mediterranean cuisine.
instructions: Combine rice vinegar, olive oil, lemon juice, honey, cumin, smoked paprika, and salt in a bowl, whisking until smooth.
Add chopped parsley, sliced almonds, mustard seeds, and dill to the bowl, stirring to combine.
Grate the garlic and ginger over the top of the mixture.
Add the sliced bellflower-root-doraji to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours.
Just before serving, stir in the water and divide the mixture among four bowls.
Top each bowl with a few ice cubes and garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional sliced almonds and a side of mustard seeds, if desired.
Adjust seasoning as needed, to taste.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh herbs and edible flowers, if desired.
